selected_issue.issue: Missing calibration availability diagnostics in replay validation summary
selected_issue.title: Replay assessment omitted calibration-status fields, blocking unambiguous Chapter 9.5 calibration diagnosis

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Current evidence showed no unresolved rank 1-4 issues (no structural failures, no failing canonical tests, no replay mismatch signal, and no high-frequency diagnostic invariant failures). The highest unresolved bounded issue was rank 5 missing instrumentation because replay summaries silently omitted calibration availability/status fields.

checks.command: python3 probe for replay calibration status keys

files_changed.change: Added explicit calibration diagnostics outputs: availability flag, unavailable reason, and placeholder metric fields.
Added new required schema keys/types for calibration diagnostics outputs.
Added assertions for deterministic calibration diagnostics values on replay fixture.

validation_performed.result: summary includes new calibration diagnostics fields; structural_violations_total=0, behavioral_violations_total=0, invariant_violations_total=0

before_after_evidence.before: Replay summary lacked explicit calibration availability/status keys, so calibration observability was ambiguous.
before_after_evidence.after: Replay summary now always emits calibration status fields and deterministic unavailable reason when labels are absent.

unresolved_risks: Current replay fixtures still do not include explicit series-outcome labels, so numeric calibration metrics remain unavailable by design.
This run improves observability only; it does not implement labeled-data calibration scoring.
stop_reason: Selected rank-5 instrumentation gap was fixed with minimal bounded changes and validated; further progress requires a broader labeled replay data pipeline outside this run scope.
